title: ChargePoint Debuts 600kW Express Solo Fast Charger
detail: ChargePoint has unveiled the Express Solo 600kW EV fast charger, the highest-power charger the company has built, designed specifically for space-constrained sites. The compact form factor allows high-power DC fast charging at locations that previously could not accommodate large multi-port charging plazas, expanding the addressable market for ultra-fast charging infrastructure.

media.caption: ChargePoint Express Solo 600kW fast charger for space-constrained sites

title: Amazon Partners with Einride to Scale Electric Semi-Truck Fleet
detail: Amazon has partnered with Swedish autonomous electric freight company Einride to expand its electric semi-truck fleet capacity for both last-mile and long-haul delivery operations. The deal accelerates Amazon's broader electrification of its logistics network and marks one of the largest commercial deployments of Einride's autonomous electric trucks, which operate without a cab and can be remotely monitored.

media.caption: Amazon and Einride partner to expand electric semi-truck fleet for last-mile and long-haul delivery
